model.name: Ideogram v4 TurboTime FP8 9.3B
model.description: Ideogram v4 TurboTime uses the Ideogram 4 conditional transformer with the TurboTime LoRA for fast few-step text-to-image generation. This variant runs without CFG and does not load the unconditional transformer branch.

prompt: {"aspect_ratio":"1:1","high_level_description":"A clean editorial poster for a fictional jazz festival called NIGHT GLASS, featuring bold readable typography, a black grand piano reflected in rain-slick pavement, neon cyan and warm amber lighting, elegant modern graphic design, high contrast.","compositional_deconstruction":{"background":"A dark rainy city square at night with soft neon reflections, subtle mist, and a polished poster-like composition.","elements":[{"type":"text","bbox":[90,70,260,930],"desc":"Large crisp headline text reading NIGHT GLASS in a refined modern sans-serif typeface, centered near the top with excellent legibility."},{"type":"text","bbox":[780,150,870,850],"desc":"Small readable event line text: JAZZ FESTIVAL 2026."},{"type":"obj","bbox":[330,190,720,830],"desc":"A glossy black grand piano in three-quarter view, with cyan and amber reflections on its curved body and keys."}]}}
